arts.ttl: A Barcelona teammate informed Fermín López of extent of his latest injury
arts.sum: An interesting story surrounding the latest injury suffered by Barcelona starlet Fermín López has this weekend come to the fore online. Youngster Fermín, of course, finds himself sidelined once more…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick provides injury updates on Barcelona pair Gavi & Frenkie de Jong
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has on Saturday provided updates on the wellbeing of two of the club’s sidelined stars. The pair in question? Gavi, and Frenkie de Jong. Midfield…

arts.ttl: Barcelona transfer news: Mason Greenwood 'scouted' amid three-club battle
arts.sum: Barcelona, Atletico Madrid and Bayern Munich reportedly all send scouts to watch Marseille's Mason Greenwood amid his fast start to life in Ligue 1.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen sensation Wirtz names Barcelona star as world’s best talent
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen star Florian Wirtz has on Saturday moved to reveal his appreciation for a member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona. Wirtz, for his part, is…

arts.ttl: Team News: Villarreal vs. Barcelona injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's La Liga clash between Villarreal and Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Three youth talents train with Barcelona ahead of Villarreal
arts.sum: A trio of up-and-coming talents were spotted playing their part in first-team training with Hansi Flick’s Barcelona squad on Saturday. This comes amid final preparations for Barca’s return to action,…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick sends 'clear' warning to Marc-Andre ter Stegen over Monaco error
arts.sum: Hansi Flick has revealed he has given goalkeeper Marc-Andre ter Stegen "clear orders" to ensure there is not a repeat of his costly error in Barcelona's 2-1 defeat to Monaco. "Playing with his feet is one of Ter Stegen’s strengths, beyond just shot-stopping," Flick said.

arts.ttl: Why Barcelona had to 'hide' Lamine Yamal before his debut
arts.sum: Former Barcelona sporting director Jordi Cruyff, who left the club in 2023, has now revealed that he and ex-head coach Xavi were eager to play Yamal even earlier than planned. Barcelona were reluctant to start Lamine Yamal when he was younger amid fear that other clubs would poach him before he could be signed to a contract.

arts.ttl: Barcelona wonderkid has already made transfer decision
arts.sum: Barcelona youngster Fermin Lopez has 'already agreed' a new contract, according to Spanish media. Lamine Yamal and Pau Cubarsi have already verbally agreed to sign lucrative long-term contracts when they will be allowed to do so after turning 18, while Marc Casado, one of the breakout stars of the young Hansi Flick era, has stated that he wants to wear Barcelona's famous kit for the rest of his career.

arts.ttl: Barça can handle workload despite injuries - Flick
arts.sum: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick insists his team can cope with an increased workload and that he will make no excuses despite having to deal with a lengthy injury list.
